title: Preparation of tissue culture plates for neural rosettes and neural progenitors

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"43gld","text":"Please refer to the attached full manuscipt for requried materials.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Coat 3 wells of a 6-well plate with 1 mL Poly-L-Ornithine (PLO) for 02:00:00 or overnight in humidified incubator.
Aspirate off PLO and rinse 3 times with DMEM/F12.
Dilute laminin to 10 μg/mL final in cold DMEM/F12 and add 1 mL/well of solution to PLO coated plates.
Incubate for 02:00:00 or overnight in humidified incubator.
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
